summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of LEAMSS Portal color scheme overhaul. All 4 dashboards (Admin, Partner, Case Manager, Client) verified with new LEAMSS brand colors (teal #2a777a, orange #f7620b). NO YELLOW backgrounds found. Workflow editor fully functional with add/edit/delete steps.
passed_tests: Login page - teal color scheme verified
Admin Dashboard - dark slate sidebar, teal active nav, orange/teal/green card borders
Admin Dashboard - Products tab with workflow steps displayed
Admin Dashboard - Edit Workflow button opens workflow editor dialog
Admin Dashboard - Add Step button in workflow editor (orange)
Admin Dashboard - 9 workflow steps displayed with edit/delete buttons
Admin Dashboard - Users tab with search functionality
Admin Dashboard - Create User button (orange)
Admin Dashboard - User impersonation Switch buttons (teal)
Admin Dashboard - Revenue tab with teal/orange gradient cards
Partner Dashboard - dark slate sidebar, teal active nav
Partner Dashboard - New Sale button (orange)
Partner Dashboard - Sales list with approved badges
Partner Dashboard - Commission tracking with teal amounts
Case Manager Dashboard - dark slate sidebar, teal active nav
Case Manager Dashboard - Cases list with In Progress badges
Client Dashboard - teal gradient header with case overview
Client Dashboard - Progress bar and stats cards
Client Dashboard - Workflow Progress with completed/active/locked states
Client Dashboard - My Documents with Approved badges
Client Dashboard - Additional Documents Requested section (orange border)
NO YELLOW BACKGROUNDS anywhere in the application

color_scheme_verification.teal_2a777a: Used for: active nav buttons, primary buttons, card borders, icons, gradient backgrounds
color_scheme_verification.orange_f7620b: Used for: create buttons, logo icons, pending actions, secondary accents
color_scheme_verification.red_d81f26: Used for: delete buttons, destructive actions
color_scheme_verification.white_cards: All card backgrounds are white - NO YELLOW

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 dashboards verified with LEAMSS brand colors. Workflow editor in Admin Dashboard fully functional. No yellow backgrounds anywhere. All login credentials working. 3 active cases, 3 approved sales in the system.
